title: HUT Stock: Analyst Forecasts and Price Targets
text: HUT Stock Analyst Forecasts: Consensus price target is $107.72, representing a forecasted 5.13% upside from the current price of $102.47 as of May 15, 2026. Price Target Range: Highest target $156.00, Lowest target $30.00, based on 18 Wall Street analysts. Consensus Rating: Moderate Buy with rating score of 2.94 out of 5. Rating Breakdown: Buy ratings 16, Strong Buy ratings 1, Sell ratings 1, Hold ratings 0. Recent Analyst Activity: Jefferies Financial Group initiated coverage with Buy rating and $156.00 target (May 14). Compass Point set target of $130.00 (May 13). B. Riley Financial boosted target from $76.00 to $130.00 (May 13). Rosenblatt Securities raised target from $89.00 to $124.00 (May 8). Performance: Hut 8's consensus rating score of 2.94 exceeds finance sector average of 2.30, indicating stronger analyst sentiment compared to comparable companies.
